keyTargets: Execute LT1 decoupling test on the long row (target HR 150-155, flat split, nasal breathing, log HR for first/second halves).
Initiate Soleus wall-sits (3x30-45s @ RPE 7-8, knee ~80°, forefoot push).
Ensure Triceps pushdown load (42.5) allows for clean RIR 2 across all sets.
warnings: You are 3/7 days into your SI symptom-free streak for Phase B running reintroduction. Any SI flare will reset the clock. Monitor all movements.
Accutane: Remember no sauna. Watch for muscle pain (>72h), dark urine, unilateral weakness, or calf cramping. Escalate to CK lab draw if any occur.
highlights: Successfully hit peak HR 191 bpm in Friday's field test with no SI symptoms.
Preacher curl load locked in at 50/arm after a strong W3 Wed session (50x12 RIR 2).
Chest-supported row is a new addition today, offering dual-purpose for lat growth and rear delt health.

exercises.name: Lat pulldown, neutral grip
exercises.note: 4 sets of 8-10 reps. Anchor S1 at 125, drift to 130 for S2-3, back off to 120 for S4. Target RPE 8, last set to RIR 1.

exercises.name: Chest-supported row
exercises.note: 3 sets of 10 reps @ 80. Hold 80 for this new exercise. Target RPE 8.

exercises.name: Cable lateral raise (unilateral)
exercises.note: 3 sets of 12-15 reps @ 5/side uni. Target RPE 9.

exercises.name: Preacher curl machine
exercises.note: 3 sets of 12 reps @ 50/arm (last session: 50x12 RIR 2). Target RPE 8.

exercises.name: Triceps pushdown (rope attachment)
exercises.note: 3 sets of 12-15 reps @ 42.5 (last session: failed at 50, hold 42.5). Hold this weight until you can achieve RIR 2 across all 3 sets. Target RPE 8.

exercises.name: Cable crunch
exercises.note: 3 sets of 12 reps @ 42.5 (last session: W1 Sat RPE 8). Target RPE 8.

exercises.name: Seated calf raise
exercises.note: 4 sets of 12-15 reps @ 315 (RIR 2 sustained). Target RPE 9, last set to failure.

exercises.name: Soleus wall-sit isometric
exercises.note: 3 sets of 30-45 seconds (first session). Bend knee ~80°, push through forefoot. Target RPE 7-8.

cardio.notes: 65 minutes total. This session is designed to verify LT1: hold a flat split for the full duration. Log your average HR for the first 32 minutes and the last 33 minutes for decoupling analysis. Aim to maintain nasal breathing throughout.
